Created attachment 191832
py-coreschema.shar

Hello,

attached is the shar archive for the Python package py-coreschema. It provides a baseline schema for the Core API (http://www.coreapi.org).

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for py27 + py36 flavors -> OK
